session.user: Run `uv run pytest tests/unit/cli/test_json_output.py tests/commands/one_shot/ -v` and report results. Do NOT fix any errors.
session.assistant: I'll run the pytest command to execute the tests and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run pytest on json_output and one_shot tests
